frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment:
A: Beta, aajkal shaadi bhi seedha rishta kam, legal risk zyada lagta hai ladkon ke liye.
B: Kyun, Mummy?
A: Dekho, divorce hote hi alimony aur 498A ka darr alag, chahe galti kisi ki bhi ho. Isliye main kehti hoon, ladke walon ko bhi ab sambhal ke chalna chahiye, har modern ladki seedhi nahi hoti, kuch ko bas settled ladka aur uska paisa chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially exploitative and frames legal protections like 498A and alimony as threats to men. It encodes victimhood inversion, suspicion of women as golddiggers, and the claim that marriage laws are one-sided against men.
original_frame: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
persona_text: You are Deepa. Age 48. Married. A homemaker in Delhi. You are watching a news segment on TV about a woman who was assaulted in a moving cab late at night. Your 22 year old daughter is sitting next to you watching the same segment. You are telling your daughter what the news segment makes you think and what lesson she should take from this story and what the woman in the news should have done differently.
